subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! Thy letter hath been received, its contents a supplication at the threshold of the Lord of the Kingdom. 'Abdu'l-Bahá, likewise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه شما رسید مضمون تبتل بدرگاه حضرت رب الملکوت بود عبدالبهاء نیز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
